svg.title: RDF graph of ex:Acme, ex:Alice, ex:Bob, ex:Carol
svg.desc: Visual representation of the RDF data showing four nodes (Acme, Alice, Bob, Carol) and their properties and relationships.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about ex:Acme and its properties')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about ex:Alice and her properties')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about ex:Bob and his properties')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about ex:Carol and her properties')
